queue_item.action: Add deny-by-default temporal validity checks so immutable provenance is not mistaken for current evidence.

progress.finding: Evidence provenance and builder trust require a separate temporal-validity gate for time-sensitive acceptance.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical planned files

queue_item.handoff: Apply freshness evaluation after structural, provenance, cryptographic, and trusted-builder checks. Set validity windows by claim class; freshness must never be treated as truth.
